message.thinking: We need to answer each of the evaluation questions. We have a topic: "Uzlabojums Alfa-beta algoritmam nepateicīgu stāvokļu gadījumā" (Improvement of alpha-beta algorithm in case of non-terminating states). Final text: "Īss katras noslēguma darba nodaļas un pielikumu satura apraksts." Means: "Short description of each final work chapter and appendix content." So the final text is just one sentence: "Īss katras noslēguma darba nodaļas un pielikumu satura apraksts." It's not a list of chapters, not description of contents, not structure. So all three questions: text does not comply. Provide feedback: "Text does not list chapters, no description, no structure." Provide JSON array with three objects. Each object: "question": "Chapters", "Description", "Structure". Provide feedback: "Text is only a single sentence that does not list chapters or describe content; lacks structure." Complies: false. Ensure exactly 3 objects. No extra explanation.
